content: Curiosity-driven intrinsic reward mechanisms (like ICM and RND from Topic A) can be re-purposed to prune and prioritize long-term memory storage in cutting-edge 2024-2025 active learning agents, creating a self-organizing memory system that only retains information the agent intrinsically judges as high-value for future learning. This replaces current SOTA memory systems that rely on hand-crafted retention rules or task-specific extrinsic labels to manage memory capacity.
